data.body: SESSION HANDOFF STATE (2026-07-15, session 'calibration epics'). IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE AND PUSHED; LANDING PENDING. Gerrit change 718 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/718) carries the full oracle-grade split on branch floorsplit/7d91 in worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar/.claude/worktrees/cyclefix (commit subject 'calibration-followup: large-sleepful-needlefish: split ac_unverifiable floor into oracle-kind grades (plan-v3)'). Contents: decide.py ORACLE_GRADE01 + UNDERSPECIFIED_ORACLE_CONTRIB=0.55 with the axis special-cased out of both generic _SEV01 loops; verify.py PlanSeverityAttrs.ac_unverifiable -> Literal closed set (write-time enforcement, verified rejecting old grades in both strict modes; file trimmed to exactly 800 lines for the module-size gate); both verifier prompts re-worded with the three grade definitions + worked examples; workflow_ops.enrich_operator_attested clears missing/underspecified but never broken_oracle; sidecar IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION -> plan-v3 (schema id stays plan_review_result_v2); docs/plan-review-gate.md graded-floor passage added; tests: new tests/unit/test_oracle_grade_split.py (7 tests incl. rejection path, enrich asymmetry, legacy plan-v2 fixture read-as-is) + updated pins in test_impact_plan.py / test_impact_model_versioning.py / test_a8e5_operator_attested_edge.py / test_plan_review.py / _audit_page_helpers.py (now uses the constant). Preflight: lint + typecheck green; full suite green except the since-fixed module-size cap (module-size + all touched tests re-verified green directly); a confirmation full-suite run and a Gerrit vote poll were running at handoff. REMAINING TO CLOSE: (1) wait for LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 on change 718 (address findings by amend --no-edit + re-push if any); (2) submit via POST /a/changes/718/submit as RebarBotNava with unresolved_comment_count==0; (3) close this ticket from the worktree AFTER merge with an AC-evidence comment (change URL, votes, merged SHA, test names) via 'rebar transition 7d91-55fc-e07c-4101 in_progress closed' - remediate any completion-verifier FAIL, never --force-close. Plan-review attestation was signed on round-4 PASS; claim held by RebarBotNava.
